channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok Ban Looms: Apple and Google Told to Remove App from Stores
item.description: Top lawmakers on the House Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) have told Apple and Google to prepare for TikTok's removal from their app stores, as a potential ban looms next month.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
